templates.use_when: Promoting an upcoming event — anything that has NOT happened yet. Sports day, annual day, PTM, fair, competition, exam dates.
Post-event coverage with photos from an event that already happened. Use this most often for school events.
One student or one teacher achieved something notable — rank, award, competition win, selection.
Multiple students achieved something — board toppers, JEE/NEET results, competition podium, merit list.
Festival or national holiday wishes — Diwali, Holi, Independence Day, Republic Day, Teachers Day, etc.
